'''Shadows of Custodia''' is a short [[quest]] set in [[Auburnvale]], where whispers of missing children and strange creatures haunt the town.

==Details==
{{Quest details
|start = Read the [[Noticeboard (Shadows of Custodia)|notice board]] in [[Auburn Pub]].
|startmap = 1396,3356
|difficulty = Experienced
|length = Short
|description = Something is wrong in Auburnvale. A faded notice in the local pub hints at missing children but no one's looking. Locals speak in riddles, strange claw marks scar the walls, and fear hangs heavy in the air. With the town turning a blind eye, it's up to you to uncover the truth hiding in the shadows.

== Walkthrough ==

=== Starting off ===
The quest begins in the [[Auburn Pub]]. Players have several options for reaching [[Auburnvale]]:

* Taking [[Renu]] to Auburnvale, then running south-west
* Using [[Fairy rings|fairy ring]] {{Fairycode|AIS}}, then running north over the bridge
* Teleporting to [[Nemus Retreat]] with the [[pendant of ates]] (if the nearby statue has been unlocked), then running north into the town

Once inside the pub, read the [[Notice board (Shadows of Custodia)|notice board]] hanging on the wall. You notice that the board is covered entirely in missing person posters, and decide to try and look for the missing people.

===Auburn alert===
{{Needed|A [[fishing rod]] (or [[oily fishing rod]]) and one empty [[inventory space]]|recommended=[[Stamina potion]]}}After starting the quest, talk to [[Marcus]] nearby in the bar, who will tell you about a strange man by the sea claiming the missing people were abducted. The man that Marcus is referring to is [[Ictus]], who is found north-east of the sawmill. Talk to Ictus, and he'll tell you that creatures walking on two legs have been scraping against the walls at night. Besides Marcus and Ictus, you can talk to [[Captain Ariadna]], the [[Bartender (Auburn Pub)|bartender]], and the [[Shopkeeper (Auburnvale)|shopkeeper]] for more information about what's happening. Speaking to <u>at least</u> one of them is required to continue. (If you don't have a hammer and fishing rod yet, it is recommended to talk to the shopkeeper in the general store as you can buy both while you're there.)
[[File:Shadows of Custodia - investigating the house.png|thumb|250px|Investigating the outside of the house.]]
Next, go to the house west of the Auburn Pub and speak to [[Francis (Auburnvale)|Francis]] or [[Aemilia]]. If you haven't talked to Marcus and Ictus yet, the two will refuse to believe you want to help them. Once they've agreed to help you, they will mention that their boys vanished whilst playing upstairs one night. They also mention strange behaviour from the ents that night, who usually pass by their house on a regular path; on the night of the disappearance, however, the ents did not approach their house, as if the ents were avoiding something. 

You will ask if you can search their house for clues, and they will allow you to look around. Go outside and investigate the scratched [[Wall (Shadows of Custodia)|wall]]. You will notice strange claw marks and a [[Puddle (Shadows of Custodia) |puddle]] of mysterious liquid; follow the trail south-west outside the town (you don't need to inspect the puddles), until you reach a river with an item hanging on a [[Plank (Shadows of Custodia)|plank]]. With a fishing rod (one spawns south-west of the log, and the [[general store]] nearby sells them as well), retrieve the [[wet fabric scrap]] and bring it to Francis or Amelia, who will confirm that it matches what their sons were wearing at the time. 
[[File:Shadows of Custodia - the lost sons.png|thumb|250px|The player finds the two injured boys.]]
After showing the scrap, head back out of town, and follow the path, which will loop around to the northern end of the [[Custodia Pass]]. South-east of the rowboat will be a [[Cave (Shadows of Custodia)|cave]]; this is the [[Stalker Den]], in which you will find the two boys. Speak to the [[injured boy]] deeper inside, and you will automatically bring them back to town, with Francis and Aemilia thanking you for saving them.

===Helping around town===
{{Needed|Four [[maple logs]], a [[hammer]], and four [[willow longbow]]s}}

When you ask to speak to the boys about what happened to them, Aemilia and Francis will say that they're still recovering and refuse to let you. They'll ask you to inform Captain Ariadna of what happened, and when you ask if there's any other way you can help, they'll mention that the scratched wall needs to be reinforced so that the boys aren't abducted again. Use four [[maple logs]], and a [[hammer]] to reinforce the scratched wall on the {{FloorNumber|uk=0}}. [[Maple trees]] can be found around town, with a [[hammer]] spawn located just to the north, in the building with a furnace.

Next, talk to Captain Ariadna by the town gate, and she'll ask if you saw anyone else in the caves. Your character will then offer to help prepare the guards. Captain Ariadna will tell you that their fletcher, [[Antos]], has gone missing and they are in need of bows; she will request four [[Willow longbow|willow longbows]] for her team. You can grab them from the nearby [[bank]], fletch them using the trees and [[flax]] in the area, or use the nearby [[Quetzal Transport System|quetzal]] to travel to [[Tal Teklan]] and buy them from [[Arcuani's Archery Supplies]].

After giving Captain Ariadna the bows and reinforcing the scratched wall, [[Shas]] and [[Etz]] will be well enough to talk to you. Talk to them on the {{FloorNumber|uk=1}} of Aemilia and Francis's house and they will tell you that Antos was also in the cave with them. After telling you that he was dragged deeper into the cave, they will ask you to rescue him.

===Rescuing Antos===
{{Needed|Combat gear}}
[[File:Shadows of Custodia - fighting strange creatures.png|thumb|250px||A player fighting some strange creatures.]]
Grab some combat gear and head back to the cave entrance from earlier. Inside, run east to a small chamber offshoot to find Antos; you will try to get him out, but three level 93 [[Strange creature (Shadows of Custodia)|strange creatures]] will attack. Activate [[Protect from Melee]] to reduce almost all damage (note that this section of the cave is a [[multicombat area]]). The creatures will also occasionally inflict a [[bleed]], but standing still will reduce the chances of triggering it.

After killing the last of the strange creatures, Antos will ask about the others, but you will sadly tell him that they were all dead. You will automatically bring him back to town; after the dialogue, inform Captain Ariadna of the monsters and that you found Antos, and she will thank you for your help. 

'''Congratulations, quest complete!'''

==Transcript==
{{Hastranscript|quest}}

==Trivia==
* The condition of the missing villagers’ corpses mirrors that of the infected in the [[The Stranglewood|Stranglewood]], suggesting the presence of the [[The Strangler|Strangler disease]].
* This quest contains many references to H.P. Lovecraft's short story "The Shadow over Innsmouth," including the name of the quest, disappearing townsfolk, and the custodian stalkers.

{{Shadows of Custodia}}
